revision.text:
{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=MoveHistory |desc=Lists the past moves a page has gone through |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source={{ubl|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js]]|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory-core.js]]}} }} Disentangling all the moves a page has gone through can be quite a hassle. So let this script do it for you. It adds the link "Move history" to the Tools section of the sidebar, which opens a dialog. For example, looking up the move history of [[Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] will show you something like this: {{clear}} {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} {| class="wikitable plainlinks" style="white-space: nowrap;" ! rowspan="2" | Date ! From ! rowspan="2" | Performer ! rowspan="2" | Comment |- ! To |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20060417155920}} 2006-04-17
T15:59:19Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]
([[User talk:Jerzy|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Jerzy|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | context suffices to Dab |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070323191506}} 2007-03-23
T19:15:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070325013049}} 2007-03-25
T01:30:48Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | restore original title |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070327233355}} 2007-03-27
T23:33:54Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070331174146}} 2007-03-31
T17:41:45Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | original name change for inaccurate name |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123541}} 2009-01-04
T12:35:40Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Joseosoria|Joseosoria]]
([[User talk:Joseosoria|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Joseosoria|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | per [[Grawp|consensus]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123619}} 2009-01-04
T12:36:18Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Slakr|Slakr]]
([[User talk:Slakr|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Slakr|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | reverting pagemove vandalism |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20130618035906}} 2013-06-18
T03:59:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Obiwankenobi|Obiwankenobi]]
([[User talk:Obiwankenobi|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Obiwankenobi|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | confusing dab. If we are dabbing by someone else, better to explain the relationship rather than leaving is as exercise for the reader |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20161213194244}} 2016-12-13
T19:42:43Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Fuortu|Fuortu]]
([[User talk:Fuortu|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Fuortu|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; consensus at [[Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} |} ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Limitations== *Moves within merged history appear like any other, resulting in the target of one move and the source of the next (or the current name) not lining up. *A move will not be detected if: **it was made before late June 2005; **it was the first edit since the date specified in "Since"; **the user or edit summary in the history or move log has been hidden; **there was a server latency between the revision and move log entries longer than one minute; or **the namespace prefix has been changed since the move. ==See also== *[[phab:T66184]] *[[phab:T152829]] {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=MoveHistory |desc=Lists the past moves a page has gone through |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source={{ubl|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js]]|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory-core.js]]}} }} Disentangling all the moves a page has gone through can be quite a hassle. So let this script do it for you. It adds the link "Move history" to the Tools section of the sidebar, which opens a dialog. For example, looking up the move history of [[Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] will show you something like this: {{clear}} {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} {| class="wikitable plainlinks" style="white-space: nowrap;" ! rowspan="2" | Date ! From ! rowspan="2" | Performer ! rowspan="2" | Comment |- ! To |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20060417155920}} 2006-04-17
T15:59:19Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]
([[User talk:Jerzy|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Jerzy|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | context suffices to Dab |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070323191506}} 2007-03-23
T19:15:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070325013049}} 2007-03-25
T01:30:48Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | restore original title |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070327233355}} 2007-03-27
T23:33:54Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070331174146}} 2007-03-31
T17:41:45Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | original name change for inaccurate name |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123541}} 2009-01-04
T12:35:40Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Joseosoria|Joseosoria]]
([[User talk:Joseosoria|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Joseosoria|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | per [[Grawp|consensus]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123619}} 2009-01-04
T12:36:18Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Slakr|Slakr]]
([[User talk:Slakr|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Slakr|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | reverting pagemove vandalism |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20130618035906}} 2013-06-18
T03:59:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Obiwankenobi|Obiwankenobi]]
([[User talk:Obiwankenobi|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Obiwankenobi|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | confusing dab. If we are dabbing by someone else, better to explain the relationship rather than leaving is as exercise for the reader |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20161213194244}} 2016-12-13
T19:42:43Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Fuortu|Fuortu]]
([[User talk:Fuortu|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Fuortu|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; consensus at [[Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} |} ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Limitations== *Moves within merged history appear like any other, resulting in the target of one move and the source of the next (or the current name) not lining up. *A move will not be detected if: **it was made before late June 2005; **it was the first edit since the date specified in "Since"; **the user or edit summary in the history or move log has been hidden; **there was a server latency between the revision and move log entries longer than one minute; or **the namespace prefix has been changed since the move. ==See also== *[[phab:T66184]] *[[phab:T152829]] {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=MoveHistory |desc=Lists the past moves a page has gone through |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source={{ubl|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js]]|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory-core.js]]}} }} Disentangling all the moves a page has gone through can be quite a hassle. So let this script do it for you. It adds the link "Move history" to the Tools section of the sidebar, which opens a dialog. For example, looking up the move history of [[:en:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] will show you something like this: {{clear}} {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} {| class="wikitable plainlinks" style="white-space: nowrap;" ! rowspan="2" | Date ! From ! rowspan="2" | Performer ! rowspan="2" | Comment |- ! To |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20060417155920}} 2006-04-17
T15:59:19Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]
([[User talk:Jerzy|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Jerzy|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | context suffices to Dab |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070323191506}} 2007-03-23
T19:15:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070325013049}} 2007-03-25
T01:30:48Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | restore original title |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070327233355}} 2007-03-27
T23:33:54Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070331174146}} 2007-03-31
T17:41:45Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | original name change for inaccurate name |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123541}} 2009-01-04
T12:35:40Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Joseosoria|Joseosoria]]
([[User talk:Joseosoria|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Joseosoria|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | per [[Grawp|consensus]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123619}} 2009-01-04
T12:36:18Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Slakr|Slakr]]
([[User talk:Slakr|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Slakr|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | reverting pagemove vandalism |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20130618035906}} 2013-06-18
T03:59:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Obiwankenobi|Obiwankenobi]]
([[User talk:Obiwankenobi|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Obiwankenobi|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | confusing dab. If we are dabbing by someone else, better to explain the relationship rather than leaving is as exercise for the reader |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20161213194244}} 2016-12-13
T19:42:43Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Fuortu|Fuortu]]
([[User talk:Fuortu|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Fuortu|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; consensus at [[Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} |} ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Limitations== *Moves within merged history appear like any other, resulting in the target of one move and the source of the next (or the current name) not lining up. *A move will not be detected if: **it was made before late June 2005; **it was the first edit since the date specified in "Since"; **the user or edit summary in the history or move log has been hidden; **there was a server latency between the revision and move log entries longer than one minute; or **the namespace prefix has been changed since the move. ==See also== *[[phab:T66184]] *[[phab:T152829]] {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=MoveHistory |desc=Lists the past moves a page has gone through |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source={{ubl|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js]]|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory-core.js]]}} }} Disentangling all the moves a page has gone through can be quite a hassle. So let this script do it for you. It adds the link "Move history" to the Tools section of the sidebar, which opens a dialog. For example, looking up the move history of [[:en:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] will show you something like this: {{clear}} {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} {| class="wikitable plainlinks" style="white-space: nowrap;" ! rowspan="2" | Date ! From ! rowspan="2" | Performer ! rowspan="2" | Comment |- ! To |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20060417155920}} 2006-04-17
T15:59:19Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]
([[User talk:Jerzy|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Jerzy|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | context suffices to Dab |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070323191506}} 2007-03-23
T19:15:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070325013049}} 2007-03-25
T01:30:48Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | restore original title |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070327233355}} 2007-03-27
T23:33:54Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070331174146}} 2007-03-31
T17:41:45Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | original name change for inaccurate name |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123541}} 2009-01-04
T12:35:40Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Joseosoria|Joseosoria]]
([[User talk:Joseosoria|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Joseosoria|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | per [[:en:Grawp|consensus]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123619}} 2009-01-04
T12:36:18Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Slakr|Slakr]]
([[User talk:Slakr|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Slakr|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | reverting pagemove vandalism |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20130618035906}} 2013-06-18
T03:59:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Obiwankenobi|Obiwankenobi]]
([[User talk:Obiwankenobi|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Obiwankenobi|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | confusing dab. If we are dabbing by someone else, better to explain the relationship rather than leaving is as exercise for the reader |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20161213194244}} 2016-12-13
T19:42:43Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Fuortu|Fuortu]]
([[User talk:Fuortu|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Fuortu|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; consensus at [[Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} |} ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Limitations== *Moves within merged history appear like any other, resulting in the target of one move and the source of the next (or the current name) not lining up. *A move will not be detected if: **it was made before late June 2005; **it was the first edit since the date specified in "Since"; **the user or edit summary in the history or move log has been hidden; **there was a server latency between the revision and move log entries longer than one minute; or **the namespace prefix has been changed since the move. ==See also== *[[phab:T66184]] *[[phab:T152829]] {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=MoveHistory |desc=Lists the past moves a page has gone through |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source={{ubl|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js]]|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory-core.js]]}} }} Disentangling all the moves a page has gone through can be quite a hassle. So let this script do it for you. It adds the link "Move history" to the Tools section of the sidebar, which opens a dialog. For example, looking up the move history of [[:en:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] will show you something like this: {{clear}} {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} {| class="wikitable plainlinks" style="white-space: nowrap;" ! rowspan="2" | Date ! From ! rowspan="2" | Performer ! rowspan="2" | Comment |- ! To |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20060417155920}} 2006-04-17
T15:59:19Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]
([[User talk:Jerzy|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Jerzy|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | context suffices to Dab |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070323191506}} 2007-03-23
T19:15:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070325013049}} 2007-03-25
T01:30:48Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | restore original title |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070327233355}} 2007-03-27
T23:33:54Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070331174146}} 2007-03-31
T17:41:45Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | original name change for inaccurate name |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123541}} 2009-01-04
T12:35:40Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Joseosoria|Joseosoria]]
([[User talk:Joseosoria|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Joseosoria|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | per [[:en:Grawp|consensus]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123619}} 2009-01-04
T12:36:18Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Slakr|Slakr]]
([[User talk:Slakr|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Slakr|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | reverting pagemove vandalism |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20130618035906}} 2013-06-18
T03:59:05Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Obiwankenobi|Obiwankenobi]]
([[User talk:Obiwankenobi|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Obiwankenobi|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | confusing dab. If we are dabbing by someone else, better to explain the relationship rather than leaving is as exercise for the reader |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20161213194244}} 2016-12-13
T19:42:43Z] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" | [[User:Fuortu|Fuortu]]
([[User talk:Fuortu|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Fuortu|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top; white-space: normal;" | [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; consensus at [[Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} |} ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Limitations== *Moves within merged history appear like any other, resulting in the target of one move and the source of the next (or the current name) not lining up. *A move will not be detected if: **it was made before late June 2005; **it was the first edit since the date specified in "Since"; **the user or edit summary in the history or move log has been hidden; **there was a server latency between the revision and move log entries longer than one minute; or **the namespace prefix has been changed since the move. ==See also== *[[phab:T66184]] *[[phab:T152829]] {{User:Nardog/scripts}}[[Category:reimport]]

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=MoveHistory |desc=Lists the past moves a page has gone through |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source={{ubl|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js]]|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory-core.js]]}} }} Disentangling all the moves a page has gone through can be quite a hassle. So let this script do it for you. It adds the link "Move history" to the Tools section of the sidebar, which opens a dialog. For example, looking up the move history of [[Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] will show you something like this: {{clear}} {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} {| class="wikitable plainlinks" ! rowspan="2" | Date ! From ! rowspan="2" | Performer ! rowspan="2" | Comment |- ! To |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20060417155920}} 15:59,
17 April 2006] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]
([[User talk:Jerzy|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Jerzy|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | context suffices to Dab |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070323191506}} 19:15,
23 March 2007] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070325013049}} 01:30,
25 March 2007] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | restore original title |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070327233355}} 23:33,
27 March 2007] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070331174146}} 17:41,
31 March 2007] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | original name change for inaccurate name |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123541}} 12:35,
4 January 2009] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Joseosoria|Joseosoria]]
([[User talk:Joseosoria|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Joseosoria|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | per [[:Grawp|consensus]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123619}} 12:36,
4 January 2009] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Slakr|Slakr]]
([[User talk:Slakr|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Slakr|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | reverting pagemove vandalism |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20130618035906}} 03:59,
18 June 2013] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Obiwankenobi|Obiwankenobi]]
([[User talk:Obiwankenobi|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Obiwankenobi|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | confusing dab. If we are dabbing by someone else, better to explain the relationship rather than leaving is as exercise for the reader |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20161213194244}} 19:42,
13 December 2016] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Fuortu|Fuortu]]
([[User talk:Fuortu|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Fuortu|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | [[:Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; consensus at [[:Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} |} ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Limitations== *Moves within [[WP:HISTMERGE|merged history]] appear like any other, resulting in the target of one move and the source of the next (or the current name) not lining up. *A move will not be detected if: **it was made before late June 2005; **it was the first edit since the date specified in "Since"; **the user or edit summary in the history or move log has been hidden; **there was a server latency between the revision and move log entries longer than one minute; or **the namespace prefix has been changed since the move. ==See also== *[[phab:T66184]] *[[phab:T152829]] {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=MoveHistory |desc=Lists the past moves a page has gone through |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source={{ubl|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js]]|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory-core.js]]}} }} Disentangling all the moves a page has gone through can be quite a hassle. So let this script do it for you. It adds the link "Move history" to the Tools section of the sidebar, which opens a dialog. For example, looking up the move history of [[Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] will show you something like this: {{clear}} {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} {| class="wikitable plainlinks" ! rowspan="2" | Date ! From ! rowspan="2" | Performer ! rowspan="2" | Comment |- ! To |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20060417155920}} 15:59,
17 April 2006] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]
([[User talk:Jerzy|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Jerzy|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | context suffices to Dab |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070323191506}} 19:15,
23 March 2007] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:K157|K157]]

25 March 2007] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | restore original title |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070327233355}} 23:33,
27 March 2007] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:K157|K157]]
([[User talk:K157|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/K157|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" | |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070331174146}} 17:41,
31 March 2007] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Paul Barlow|Paul Barlow]]
([[User talk:Paul Barlow|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Paul Barlow|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | original name change for inaccurate name |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123541}} 12:35,
4 January 2009] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Joseosoria|Joseosoria]]
([[User talk:Joseosoria|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Joseosoria|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | per [[:Grawp|consensus]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20090104123619}} 12:36,
4 January 2009] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Slakr|Slakr]]
([[User talk:Slakr|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Slakr|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | reverting pagemove vandalism |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20130618035906}} 03:59,
18 June 2013] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Obiwankenobi|Obiwankenobi]]
([[User talk:Obiwankenobi|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Obiwankenobi|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | confusing dab. If we are dabbing by someone else, better to explain the relationship rather than leaving is as exercise for the reader |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20161213194244}} 19:42,
13 December 2016] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Fuortu|Fuortu]]
([[User talk:Fuortu|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Fuortu|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | [[:Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; consensus at [[:Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} |} ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Limitations== *Moves within [[WP:HISTMERGE|merged history]] appear like any other, resulting in the target of one move and the source of the next (or the current name) not lining up. *A move will not be detected if: **it was made before late June 2005; **it was the first edit since the date specified in "Since"; **the user or edit summary in the history or move log has been hidden; **there was a server latency between the revision and move log entries longer than one minute; or **the namespace prefix has been changed since the move. ==See also== *[[phab:T66184]] *[[phab:T152829]] {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FMoveHistory here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=MoveHistory |desc=Lists the past moves a page has gone through |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source={{ubl|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js]]|[[User:Nardog/MoveHistory-core.js]]}} }} Disentangling all the moves a page has gone through can be quite a hassle. So let this script do it for you. It adds the link "Move history" to the Tools section of the sidebar, which opens a dialog. For example, looking up the move history of [[Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] will show you something like this: {{clear}} {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway Shakespeare}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|*H E Ŗ M EE?}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} → {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} {| class="wikitable plainlinks" ! rowspan="2" | Date ! From ! rowspan="2" | Performer ! rowspan="2" | Comment |- ! To |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20060417155920}} 15:59,
17 April 2006] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]
([[User talk:Jerzy|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Jerzy|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | context suffices to Dab |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20070323191506}} 19:15,
23 March 2007] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:K157|K157]]

18 June 2013] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Obiwankenobi|Obiwankenobi]]

If we are dabbing by someone else, better to explain the relationship rather than leaving is as exercise for the reader |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} |- | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [{{fullurl:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|action=history&offset=20161213194244}} 19:42,
13 December 2016] | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (Shakespeare's wife)}} | rowspan="2" style="white-space: nowrap;" | [[User:Fuortu|Fuortu]]
([[User talk:Fuortu|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/Fuortu|contribs]]) | rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: top;" | [[:Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; consensus at [[:Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)|Talk:Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)]] |- | style="text-align: center;" | {{no redirect|Anne Hathaway (wife of Shakespeare)}} |} ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/MoveHistory.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Limitations== *Moves within [[WP:HISTMERGE|merged history]] appear like any other, resulting in the target of one move and the source of the next (or the current name) not lining up. *A move will not be detected if: **it was made before late June 2005; **it was the first edit since the date specified in "Since"; **the user or edit summary in the history or move log has been hidden; **there was a server latency between the revision and move log entries longer than one minute; or **the namespace prefix has been changed since the move. ==See also== *[[phab:T66184]] *[[phab:T152829]] {{User:Nardog/scripts}}
